Bash(textutil -convert txt CV_AdityaJiddu_ProductOwner.docx -stdout 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "
import zipfile, re
with zipfile.ZipFile\('CV_AdityaJiddu_ProductOwner.docx'\) as z:
    xml = z.read\('word/document.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)
text = re.sub\(r'<w:br[^/]*/>', '\\n', xml\)
text = re.sub\(r'</w:p>', '\\n', text\)
text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', text\)
text = re.sub\(r'\\n{3,}', '\\n\\n', text\)
print\(text[:15000]\)
")

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Microsoft Word"
  set theDoc to open POSIX file "/Users/aasmac/Desktop/Website/CV_AdityaJiddu_ProductOwner.docx"
  delay 2
  save as theDoc file name "/Users/aasmac/Desktop/Website/resume.pdf" file format format PDF
  close theDoc saving no
end tell
EOF)
